segments.text: Then went Boaz up to the gate, and sat him down there: and, behold, the kinsman of whom Boaz spake came by;
unto whom he said,
Ho, such a one! turn aside, sit down here.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: And he turned aside, and sat down.
And he took ten men of the elders of the city, and said,
Sit ye down here.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: And they sat down.
And he said unto the kinsman,
Naomi, that is come again out of the country of Moab, selleth a parcel of land, which was our brother Elimelech's:
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: I thought to advertise thee, saying, Buy it before the inhabitants, and before the elders of my people. If thou wilt redeem it, redeem it: but if thou wilt not redeem it, then tell me, that I may know: for there is none to redeem it beside thee; and I am after thee.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: I will redeem it.
segments.speaker: Kinsman

footnotes: I thought…: Heb. I said, I will reveal in thine ear

segments.text: Then said Boaz,
What day thou buyest the field of the hand of Naomi, thou must buy it also of Ruth the Moabitess, the wife of the dead, to raise up the name of the dead upon his inheritance.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: I cannot redeem it for myself, lest I mar mine own inheritance: redeem thou my right to thyself; for I cannot redeem it.
segments.speaker: Kinsman

segments.text: Now this was the manner in former time in Israel concerning redeeming and concerning changing, for to confirm all things; a man plucked off his shoe, and gave it to his neighbour: and this was a testimony in Israel.
Therefore the kinsman said unto Boaz,
Buy it for thee.
segments.speaker: Kinsman

segments.text: So he drew off his shoe.
And Boaz said unto the elders, and unto all the people,
Ye are witnesses this day, that I have bought all that was Elimelech's, and all that was Chilion's and Mahlon's, of the hand of Naomi.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: Moreover Ruth the Moabitess, the wife of Mahlon, have I purchased to be my wife, to raise up the name of the dead upon his inheritance, that the name of the dead be not cut off from among his brethren, and from the gate of his place: ye are witnesses this day.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: We are witnesses. The LORD make the woman that is come into thine house like Rachel and like Leah, which two did build the house of Israel: and do thou worthily in Ephratah, and be famous in Beth-lehem:
segments.speaker: People and Elders

footnotes: do thou…: or, get thee riches, or, power
be famous: Heb. proclaim thy name

segments.text: And let thy house be like the house of Pharez, whom Tamar bare unto Judah, of the seed which the LORD shall give thee of this young woman.
segments.speaker: People and Elders

segments.text: So Boaz took Ruth, and she was his wife: and when he went in unto her, the LORD gave her conception, and she bare a son.
Blessed be the LORD, which hath not left thee this day without a kinsman, that his name may be famous in Israel.
segments.speaker: Women

footnotes: left…: Heb. caused to cease unto thee

segments.text: And he shall be unto thee a restorer of thy life, and a nourisher of thine old age: for thy daughter in law, which loveth thee, which is better to thee than seven sons, hath born him.
segments.speaker: Women

footnotes: a nourisher of: Heb. to nourish

segments.text: And Naomi took the child, and laid it in her bosom, and became nurse unto it.
And the women her neighbours gave it a name, saying,
There is a son born to Naomi;
segments.speaker: Women

segments.text: and they called his name Obed: he is the father of Jesse, the father of David.
Now these are the generations of Pharez: Pharez begat Hezron,
And Hezron begat Ram, and Ram begat Amminadab,
And Amminadab begat Nahshon, and Nahshon begat Salmon,
And Salmon begat Boaz, and Boaz begat Obed,
And Obed begat Jesse, and Jesse begat David.
